entry.title: Re: ABAP class/FM/BAPI/IDOC to create/maintain Inbound De...
entry.content:
Hi @dhawal_patil ,

Please see below links how to manage transaction level change from program. 

https://d.dam.sap.com/a/LLzDfjK/EWM_Transaction_Handling.pdf?rc=10

Example-Program - /SCWM/R_DLV_ADJUST (See how data read and update)

Class- /scdl/cl_sp_prd_inb or /scdl/cl_sp_prd and method inset for new item... See above program as an example.

Also Check your functional Consultant and ask - to show the process (create the inbound delivery manually in SAP EWM).Thats how you build the things in program...

Please let us if you have further questions...

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: 如何在BAS中创建包含DB，SRV，Fiori的CAP工程
entry.content:
在SAP BTP环境中，SAP更推荐使用SAP Business Application Studio作为开发环境以及SAP Cloud Application Programming Model作为开发框架发，其中BAS提供了基本的开发测试部署环境，CAP框架涵盖了从DB到OData Service到Fiori的整体开发方案。

在SAP提供了多种创建CAP工程并且添加module的方法，但是在创建CAP工程的过程中，不同的选项都会影响工程配置参数。对于初学CAP开发的人员，经常因为对于创建工程的选项不熟悉，通过不同方式的创建工程，参数配置文件不完整，导致程序无法打包或者部署失败等。由于配置文件过于复杂，对于初学者很难发现其中的问题并修改。会困扰开发人员很长时间。因此，本文提供了一个如何从0创建一个CAP工程，打包部署以及本地调试的方法。可以通过这篇教程创建开发工程模板，节省开发时间。

本文主要为初学者提供一个创建最基础的MTA的CAP工程，涵盖了DB,SRV，Fiori，Managed Approuter等模块，可以成功打包部署。讲解分析创建过程中不同选项对最终工程的影响。对于资深CAP开发人员可以在本教程的基础上，个性化创建项目。

注意：BAS中CAP的版本会实时升级，本文写于2024-09，适用的版本版本如下

 

准备工作：请在SAP BTP中创建以下服务，并分配用户权限。

  • SAP Business Application Studio
  • SAP Build Workzone/ SAP Portal/ SAP BTP Fiori Launchpad
  • SAP HANA Cloud

1. SAP BAS开发环境准备

打开SAP BTP中的BAS服务，创建SAP Full Stack Cloud Application的开发空间。

2. 创建CAP工程

首先在BAS中通过模板创建一个CAP工程，选择CAP Project

 

选择SAP HANA Cloud以及Cloud Foundary: MTA Deployment.

虽然XSUAA等服务是CAP工程所需要的，但是如果在此勾选这些服务会影响后续的创建。所以在这一步无需选择。所需服务在后续步骤中添加。

 

选择Minimal Sample，程序会包含基本的DB module及SRV module

 

点击finish，等待程序创建结束

通过这种方法创建的MTA工程包含了DB和SRV module，并创建了实例代码，可以开始DB以及SRV的开发。在MTA.yaml中包含了srv及db module所需的资源，其中Hana的HDI实例可以根据项目需要修改名称。

  

 

 3. 在CAP工程中添加UI

首先添加Managed Approuter，在MTA.yaml文件上右键点击并选择Create MTA Moulde from Template，并选择Approuter Configuration

选择 Managed Approuter并且Add a UI 设置为yes

 

Managed Approuter 创建结束之后，会自动生成xsuaa的xs-security文件。

并且会自动更新MTA.yaml文件。添加Managed Approuter module以及所需services。

 

 

 

Managed approuter创建成功之后，添加Fiori Module，右键点击mta.yaml文件选择 Create module from template。选择SAP Fiori generator

 

 

 

 

 

 

Template Selection：

根据需求选择freestyle或者fiori element模板。本文选择List Report Page作为示例。

 

Data Source and Service Selection:

选择 Use a Local CAP Project, CAP_PILOT_PROJECT以及SRV提供的ODATA service

 

Entity Selection:

选择Entity。

 

Project Attributes：

输入fiori程序名字以及相关参数，注意一下两个选项需要设置成yes

 

Deploy Confuguration：

target需选择Cloud Foundry

Destination Name需要选择Local CAP Project API，选择这个选项会自动更新fiori中的xs app文件添加所需要的路由，后续会解释选择Local CAP Project API的原因。

 

Fiori Launchpad Configuration，

会更新manifest.json文件，添加BTP workzone需要的磁铁配置，如果Fiori Launchpad Configuration 选择No，会跳过此步骤，后续可以手动更新manifest文件添加所需配置

 

点击完成，创建fiori module，查看生成并修改了哪些文件

首先在deployment Configuration中选择了local cap Project API，会自动在xs-app.json中添加所需要的destination转发。如果在这一步骤选择了None，则会缺少相关的route配置。

缺少此route会导致BTP环境中 Fiori无法正确连接SRV 的OData。当运行Fiori应用时，会无法成功加载Metadata，显示404错误。因此当出现类似问题，可以首先查看xsapp文件排查错误原因。

如果在创建过程中destination name选择了None，后续需要手动添加此route。Destination名字可以在mta.yaml文件中找到。

在mta ymal文件中会添加fiori module并添加到app content中

 

至此一个涵盖了DB，SRV，Fiori的CAP工程就创建成功了。

 

4.打包部署到BTP平台

由于模板创建的工程缺少@sap/xssec，会导致SRV部署失败，所以首先在命令行执行npm install  @Sap/xssec

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

然后执行mbt build打包MTA工程

最后通过cf deploy 命令将程序部署到BTP平台。

部署成功，BTP中查看创建的instance以及部署的应用

 

Space中部署的db module 以及SRV module

 

点击application name打开Fiori程序，Fiori可以成功运行并且展示数据。

 

恭喜你！CAP创建及部署成功！

在这个项目的基础上，开始CAP开发之旅吧。

后续会有一篇文章讲解如何本地Debug 开发调试，敬请期待!

entry.title: Re: application to CF
entry.content: Unfortunately I forgot my crystal ball to help you ;-). You would need to provide more details if you expect anyone to help you.

entry.title: Re: BTP Build App
entry.content: With Build Apps you're building a web application. It can access files not directly. The browser can pass them to the Server when they where selected from the user.

entry.title: Re: Getting Cannot get/ error after deploying SAP BTP pro...
entry.content:
Hello everyone I found the solution to this error. I follow  this tutorial

 First use this command >cds add hana,mta,xsuaa,approuter --for production

I update my package.json by following this tutorial

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cap-service-deploy.html

entry.content:

entry.title: Re: price change getting error in MR21
entry.content:
Hi,

You need to check the configuration below
1) OKKP - Need to check currency settings for the controlling area
2) OBY6 - Check financial year, posting variants against company code
3) OX02 - Check company currency map properly
4) Check all configurations of the Path: Financial Accounting Global Settings (New)-> Ledgers -> Ledger

If any query please reply.

Regards,

entry.title: PDF file uploading by DTW in SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear All,

I tried the DTW OCRD Template. And add the following data : 

CardCodeCardNameAttachmentEntry
CardCodeCardNameAtcEntry
VP-10056Labmech Engineers\\172.16.3.13\SBO_Mail\Attachment

But after uploading the file, DTW giving error " 1 Update Failed VP-10056 CServiceData::SetPropertyValue failed; Value must be a whole number in property 'AttachmentEntry' of 'BusinessPartner'oBusinessPartners "

can anyone suggest the solution?

entry.title: Re: In-app purchases

Thank you so much. That was helpful!
Do you know if RevenueCat can be integarted with Sap Build Apps? (Appgyver)

@srose99

entry.title: Converting file from CRLF to LF in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
hi all,

We have a scenario where a .txt file (with multiple records)has to be placed in AL11 path of SAP for further processing. We noticed if we place Windows CRLF file then it produces a # at the end, for each record -when processing at SAP.

When changing the file manually to Unix LF, using notepad++ and placing it in AL11 , the processing happens smoothly. 

Can anyone suggest how we can achieve the LF file from CRLF using SAP Integration Suite??

Regards,

Smitha

entry.title: What scope item for Project system in Private cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone please let me know scope items in Private cloud relevant for project system.

Thank You in advance,

BRM.

entry.title: Re: price change getting error in MR21
entry.content: Hi

entry.title: Re: price change getting error in MR21

entry.title: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant
entry.content:
Expressing my interest here to join the digital skills initiative as a woman who seeks to officially break into tech.

I graduated BS Accountancy and have been using SAP in my career as an end user. I've gotten into an operations role where I was able to use SAP in operations and currently in an FP&A role where I utilize SAP to get the data I need from different departments.

My managers have been expressing their observation at how good I am at systems, and that maybe a career in digital transformation (or finance transformation) is something that I want to consider. Aside from being good in communication and business partnering, I think the most apt role that for me is to become a SAP consultant.

I've been looking through courses from different sites and on youtube, but I've read in the forums that courses in SAP academy would best help me achieve my goal, and earning a certification will give me a needed advantage to initiate the change.


In the future, I want to also get into business analytics and learn SAP Analytics Cloud as I already have domain expertise in my industry as an FP&A analyst.

Thanks and I look forward to upskilling with SAP academy and earning a certification with this initiative.

@David_Chaviano hope you can help with this. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: UI5 App with Standalone App Router gets: Timed out wa...
entry.content:
@ravijnj 

Yes we were able to solve the issue. At the end the request from cloud connector to the connectivity service IP addresses of the BTP wrer blocked by firewall settings. Only a set of IP addresses was allowed to be accessed by the cloud connector.

In fact this worked fine using the managed app router. But after deploying a standalone app including own app router, connectivity and destination service the ip address changed

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration API - Collection of OData Clients using JS/TS and SAP Cloud SDK
entry.content:
Thank you for sharing, but I question the benefit of this? Why not use the published metadata on the Business Accelerator Hub and import the required modules you need for a specific project with the standard SAP Cloud SDK commands? Creating a custom module will require you (the author of this module) to maintain this every time SAP updates the API's or it's metadata, so now developers (like me) that would rely on this module will now rely on you to maintain this for us. Sometimes these standard packages contain small errors (e.g. when a new version of the cloud solution is released but the API documentation is not updated yet), so then you'd need access to the generated content in the project to make tweaks. This would be a bit more difficult if this generated content is hidden in a node module in which you're not supposed to make changes.

Keep on exploring though! CAP and Cloud SDK are magnificent frameworks!

entry.title: Re: Every single time I try to use Java it wont work
entry.content: Is this a real post? If it is, can you explain what you are talking about -- what tool, what error you get, screenshot?

entry.title: Re: How to migrate data with CDS view behaviour LTMOM

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
entry.content: Task - 4 - Criticality for Status

entry.title: Re: Tree Table not getting refreshed from Javascript
entry.content:
Found the solution...
Put resetChanges() before refreshing the model.

sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataModel - API Reference - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK

oModel.resetChanges();

entry.title: Extract attributes from XML
entry.content:
I want to extract 2-attributes from XML. The names of attribute for extraction from this xml is -

ERPNumber, 

ProcurementUnit/UniqueName

UniqueName

 

My XML structures look like this -

<SimplifiedRequest>
<CancelExportRequest>
<OrdHeader_Item>
<item>
<ERPNumber>Y465643</ERPNumber>
<ProcurementUnit>
<UniqueName>6604</UniqueName>
</ProcurementUnit>
<UniqueName>EPT10053-V3</UniqueName>
<VersionNumber>3</VersionNumber>
<custom>
<CustomBoolean name="SuppressOrder">false</CustomBoolean>
<CustomString name="Test"/>
<CustomString name="SupplierID">AEQ600:0000399413</CustomString>
</custom>
</item>
</OrdHeader_Item>
</CancelExportRequest>
</SimplifiedRequest>

Can you help me here?

entry.title: Re: How to migrate data with CDS view behaviour LTMOM
entry.content: Hi Sybille, is there a way to simulate the data in the "Migrate Your Data" App?

entry.title: Recruiting Posting Job Board Setup: eFinancial
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Just checking if anyone has experienced what we are experiencing in the lower instances.

We are implementing RP and one of the Job Boards is eFinancial.

We are unable to enter the values for the following fields:

Team ID

Brand ID
API Key
 
We are still able to add this Job Board even without filling out those fields. When we attempt to post on this Job Board on the lower instances, the job never posts, it just gets stuck to 'Processing'.
 
In setting up the Job Board, you will be given this message:
Credentials must be provided by eFinancialCareers.com.
SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting Posting will ask for authorisation to eFinancialCareers.com once you have completed your credential configuration steps.
We were thinking maybe once you set up the Job Board, an email gets sent out to eFinancial, they need to trigger something from their end so that in our Job Boards, the three fields will be automatically field.

We've reached out to them, they have not received any email. Has anyone experienced this or know how to resolve it?

entry.title: Re: Solman_setup 500 Internal Server Error
entry.content:
Hi Yongiun,

Check this SCN thread with same error message

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/500-sap-internal-server-error-error-access-using-a-zero∂object-reference-is/td-p/11462836

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Authentication issues when using RESTful api C# for 4.2 BusinessObjects
entry.content:
I found the issue. I noticed when replying previously that the 401 response included a referece to port 8080.

i.e this part:

Access-Control-Allow-Origin: http://servername:8080

I tried the below to see if I got a response in the browser:

http://servername:8080/biprws/logon/long

 It returned the same response when using 6405.

Changing the port to 8080 in the baseurl fixed the issue and returns the token. There must be a port redirection happening?

entry.title: Re: Noted Items in CDS view
entry.content: The required data is available with CDS view I_OperationalAcctgDocItem. See details in Accounting Document Item: Operational View

entry.title: Re: Entering batch at the time of Putaway - EWM
entry.content:
Hi,

"5) Why system is asking to put the Batch at the time of GR - ROD ? "

Because the batch is part of the stock information. You do notice that if you check your stock in ERP, the stock shows the different batches and their stock, yes? So in order to post GR, the system needs a batch.

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Re: Noted Items in CDS view
entry.content: The required data is available with CDS view I_OperationalAcctgDocItem. See details in Accounting Document Item: Operational View https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/ca03bbfc892d4474be69934d6f5c783d.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Getting error 'Could not find table/view XXXX in schema SAPABAP1’ in class method for table function
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am using a CDS view in a class method for a table function . My CDS view is a consumption view with parameters. The table function and CDS view are both activated but when I try to activate the class/method it gives me the below error :-

‘Could not find table/view ZETDCNVW1360002 in schema SAPABAP1’

Method Snapshot

 

Any inputs why would this be happening?

entry.title: Re: Will firewall affects while connecting to database ta...
entry.content: Consider using the cloud connector to enable Cloud Integration to connect to your database. Then they don't need to get a public IP or port.

entry.title: Re: Will firewall affects while connecting to database ta...
entry.content:
Hi Yash,

On those two different DB servers firewall on? if it is yes, you have to take help from network security team to fulfill your requirement.

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Standard CDS view as app
entry.content:
Hi Kristian2,

kindly try to expose the cds views via app Custom Analytical Queries. Details you can follow the link below:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/33f3a229ecfe438ca6b2053c48b4e1bb.html?q=custom%20analytical%20query&locale=en-US

and you can publish it as an application.

 

Best regards,

Angela

entry.title: ECP can host 2 combined payrolls Egypt &USA,
entry.content:
Hi  Experts,

I would like to know if the ECP payroll can host combined payroll for Egypt & USA in the same system, to run both together.

Regards

Mira Atef

entry.title: Re: Define Parameter Catalog for Subprocedure Determinati...
entry.content:
Hi,

Before you can add a custom field to the parameter catalog, the custom field must exist in the extensibility business context "Sales: Pricing Communication Head".

This blog gives you a comprehensive explanation: Get to know more on Modular Pricing Procedures in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: ChaRM - Cannot select single transport for scheduled import
entry.content: An import for urgent changes will be triggered with the status change 'Import to Production' in UC. If you want to import via the task list, you need to change the import strategy.

entry.title: Re: ChaRM - Cannot select single transport for scheduled...
entry.content: An import for urgent changes will be triggered with the status change 'Import to Production' in UC. If you want to import via the task list, you need to change the import strategy.

entry.title: FM Budget Exceed at the time of MIRO
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am reaching out to seek your insights regarding a budget check issue encountered during the MIRO process for asset transactions.

In the previous fiscal year (2024), our client successfully completed the PR, PO, and GR for certain assets. However, when attempting to execute MIRO in 2025 fiscal year, the system prompts for budget availability. This shows that previous budget is fully consumed.

Interestingly, it seems to affect only 2 to 3 specific cases. Furthermore, a review of the budget consumption report from the previous year indicates that the total budget amount is still showing as available, suggesting that no amounts have actually been consumed.

appreciate any guidance or insights on how to resolve this inconsistency.

entry.title: Re: How to implement Fiscal Year Variant SZ?
entry.content: Please also refer to "Setting Up an Alternative Fiscal Year Variant" (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/b069d5700c464155b0ef2e077027e7ee.html?q=fiscal%20year%20variant&locale=en-US)

entry.title: Import ABAP Dictionary Structure doesn't Create CRUD-Methods in SEGW
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I got a problem that if I import a new structure into my data model and generate the runtime object, it doesn't create methods like CREATE, UPDATE, GET_ENTITY, GET_ENTITYSET etc. in the DPC_EXT. Does anyone know, why that is?

I'm in the transaction SEGW and created a new project for an App Extension. Thanks for the communities help in advance!

Cheers

entry.title: Re: report of slow moving item
entry.content:
T-Code MC46

In initial screen define selection with parameters like plant, period to analyze and tick check box 'stock value'

execute.

Click double/tripple line to view status with values.

Regards.

entry.title: Recruiting Posting Job Board Setup: SeekSG
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We've set up the SeekSG Job Board in the lower instances (Test). When we attempt to post to it, we first fill out the fields. However, there are two fields, specifically for SeekSG that 1) seems to load when you click on it but never shows any selection 2) can be filled out but as soon as you click outside of the field, it defaults back to being blank.

Has anyone experienced this before?

entry.title: Re: 3 Decimal places for Data Migration in S4 Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for your question.

Here's the information you're looking for:

Additional Information About XML Template Files:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d5699934e7004d048c4801b552f3b013/ca2e848ff03e478db96d7dfa9dd800f3.html?locale=en-US

"Number

  • Enter numbers with decimals in the relevant country-specific format, for example 12.34 (United States) or 12,34 (Germany). For fields with decimal places, the length includes the number of decimal places (if required), for example if the information for the column states Length: 8, Decimals: 3, then a number such as 12345.678 is permitted. Note that decimal places are not mandatory. In is this example, you can specify a whole number up to length 8 without decimal places, for example ‘1’. This number would be set to ‘1.000’ internally. For negative numbers, ensure that a minus sign (‘-‘) directly precedes the number, for example ‘-100’.

    Note that the maximum field length supported by Microsoft Excel is 15 digits (including decimals). If you have longer numbers, use the option for transferring data to S/4HANA using staging tables. For more information, see SAP Knowledge Base Article 2718516"

    Kind regards,

    Henrike

     

     

    .

entry.title: Re: PDF file uploading by DTW in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi,

AttachmentEntry accepts integer value only. Also, it will accept the existing value from OATC table.

It is required to have the entry related to VP-10056.PDF in the OATC table first. Then only, it can be referred to attach.

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Email notification to employee if his final performance rating is Not meeting expectation
entry.content:
Hello Experts 

We have 2,4,6 and 8 months performance evaluation form for new comer. we want to send email notification to the respective employee if his final performance rating is NME (Non Meeting Expectation) once his performance form is sent to completion stage by his manager.

Please guide how this is achievable

Regards

entry.title: Re: Do Virtual Tables support ST_POINT or ST_GEOMETRY
entry.content:
ok create a view in source system to convert the GEO to text.

create or replace view MYSCHEMA.MYVIEW as ( select
GEOFIELD.ST_AsText() as GEOFIELDTEXT
from "MYSCHEMA.TABLE_WITH_GEO" ) ;

in target system create VT to connect to view

Once the VT is created

Then select GEOFIELDTEXT.ST_GeomFromText() as GEOFIELD  from VT 

The Geo types have been converted back.

entry.title: Re: renumber g/l account
entry.content: Thanks for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts.

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Central Business Configuration 2406 FD3
entry.content:
With the latest feature delivery (FD3) for SAP Central Business Configuration, exciting new features are available. This blog post will provide you with a comprehensive overview of these features.

Enhanced Transparency with Deployment Descriptions

In the Deployment Target app, if you have a 3-system landscape, we’ve added a new column to display deployment descriptions. These are the descriptions that you can enter optionally when you carry out the Confirm Scope and Organizational Structure Phase Is Completed milestone. They’re now conveniently visible in the Deployment History table for easier access.

Improved User Experience with Column-Level Filters

Enhancing the user experience even further, we’ve enabled table filters at the column level. In addition to sorting table entries, you can now apply filters at the column level, making it easier to work with tables, particularly for those users working on mobile devices. This feature is available in the tables of the Deployment Target app, the Team section of the Settings app, and the Change Logs app.

Screenshot of the table filtering capabilities at column level and the Deployment Description column

For a quick summary, check out this video about What's New in 2406 & FD1–FD3. Don’t forget to also use the What’s New Viewer on the SAP Help Portal, which provides further details and links about all the recent changes.

That wraps up the new features this time. Make sure to follow the SAP Central Business Configuration tag or follow this dedicated blog collection to stay up to date with the latest blog posts.

Do you have an idea on how to further enhance SAP Central Business Configuration? Go to the SAP Customer Influence portal to submit an improvement request or vote for the ideas of others. This helps us understand your requirements even better and prioritize our work accordingly. We’re looking forward to your improvement requests.

entry.title: I want to connect SAC to my on premise SAP HANA database
entry.content: I want to connect SAC to my on premise SAP HANA database, I have filled all the necessary details but still not connecting it is showing error . Please help if any one knows any solution

entry.title: Re: How to get the MC.9 report data for prior periods?
entry.content:
Hi,

In MC.9 Initial screen, in put target periods in 'period to analyze' fields. 

define other selections like plant, SLOC, material groups e.t.c as required.

Execute.

To see time series of stocks, place cursor in valuated stock header and click time series button.

Your report will output

Regards.

ookocharlis@gmail.com

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI for Java 8.10 on the Horizon
entry.content: Looking forward to the release! Please comment or update the post as soon as it's out.

entry.title: Re: Introducing SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft PowerPoint
entry.content:
Hi @sabine_krueger1 

1. that widget texts are often cut scalable and are often cut off 

2. that that part of widgets (e.g. legends) are missing.

  [ASHOK]: Widgets are displayed based on the size available in the add-in. Users can expand the add in to see the whole content. we are also evaluating an option to provide an option to add widget in Edit button in the upcoming releases. 

Regards,
Ashok R

entry.title: Re: Best approach to compare HANA Tables
entry.content:
Hi Kiran - I propose you model a Calculation View with calculated columns which do the calculation KF T1 - KF T2. This new column could be evaluated on a more aggregated level and you could analyze in more detail only if there are results <> 0.

KR Frank

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm from Izmir, Turkey. I have been reading the wonderful blogs here for a couple of months and have enjoyed being a part of this friendly community. Now, I'd love to contribute some blogs of my own.

Best regards,
Beykan

entry.title: How do I trigger a User Defined Object in PostTransactionNotice
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a UDO and linked UDT's to it. The example below shows and extract of the lines table:

I have created the following script in PostTransactionNotice to update an external table with changes to the status. Running the query on it's own works perfectly, but it does not trigger in PostTransactionNotice.
Do I need to change something for the PostTransactionNotice to read the Objecttype?
IF @object_TYPE = 'MRMSCC' and @transaction_type = 'U'
BEGIN
Update [MRM_CC].[dbo].[ServiceCallInformation]
set ItemStatus = UF.U_ScStatus
From
(select Code,LineID,U_ScStatus from [SAP_CCR].[dbo].[@_MRMCSCLN]
where U_ScStatus = 'Closed') UF
where Id = UF.LineId
and UF.Code = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del
END

entry.title: Re: Dump Error Raise_Exception CNTL_ERROR

entry.title: Custom CDS View for Customer and Contact
entry.content:
Hi - I am currently creating a customer CDS view for API extraction. I want to return the Corporate Account to Contact relationship easily. I am currently using I_MKT_ContactRelationData & I_Mkt_Contact but it's not showing the relationship if I filter on the corporate account.

Is there a different data source we should use?

Cheers,

Marc

entry.title: Export contract net value
entry.content:
Hi, I am newbie using sap and at work we use Launchpad.

I would like to create a report and for it’s required to pull the contracts net value and to avoid doing a manual job of checking every single contract I was wondering if there’s any transaction that could do the job.

 

can anyone help me?

 

thanks a million

entry.title: Re: Using API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet
entry.content: Hi, I have recently been struggling to get tis API to work in SAP Cloud Integration. Eventually for me the solution was to put only the content of the attachment as a binary string in the message payload and to send the other information (BusinessObjectTypeName, LinkedSAPObjectKey, Slug, Content-Type) as headers. Hope it will work for you too...

entry.title: Re: Getting error 'Could not find table/view XXXX in schema SAPABAP1’ in class method for table func
entry.content:
There might be some hickup / inconsistency in the creating / editing of the View between the DB and the ABAP-Dictionary ...
As a reference, please check SAP-Note "2180238 - DDIC Inconsistency Check [VIDEO] - SAP for Me" and Note "2023690 - CDS views are inactive - SAP for Me" ...

Check in your Backend via Trx."SE14" if the View exists, is active etc ...
If a problem is indicated, you might be able to use Prgr. "RUTDDLSACT" to regenerate / activate the "Z"-CDS View? In any case, do some research before executing any of the above mentioned steps.

Hope this helps

Nic T.

entry.title: Re: Talent Intelligence Hub - Myths and Misconceptions - Part 2 (Migration)
entry.content:
@cstal you're very welcome! 😊

Regarding your questions:

  1. We are currently in the middle of a transition from the legacy skill recommendation engine that was only available to early adopters and is no longer available / supported to a brand new skill recommendation engine which is supposed to be available as of the 2H 2024 release. That new AI-powered skill recommendation feature will be a Premium AI feature and so it will consume credits. However, you can enable and use Growth Portfolio without this feature.
  2. and also 3.: The redesigned Growth Portfolio requires TIH, OMP and CWS to be in place. None of these 3 prerequisites are optional. If your customer currently doesn't have CWS or OMP, they can't use the new version of GP. There is currently no configuration option for disabling certain sections in GP like the current and future role related one. The whole point of the new experience for CWS / GP is that we want to provide a one stop shop for everything related to an employees skills & competencies, their career aspirations and plans and related growth opportunities.

My personal recommendation is to look into the extent to which your customer would benefit from OMP. Do they have on-the-job development offerings, so they could benefit from the assignments feature? Do they use SF Learning or Recruiting or Mentoring? Once they have at least 2-3 types of development opportunities in place that would feed into OMP it makes sense to have a conversation about OMP with them.

entry.title: Facing 401 unauthorized error while trying post data to CPI via SAP API Management
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to send request to SAP CPI via API Management.

But I am facing "401 Unauthorized" error while connecting to CPI though I have maintained correct credential in KeyValue Map. (CSRF token is unchecked in CPI HTTP adapter)

Using same credentials I am able to call CPI endpoint directly from Postman send data successfully.

I tried to test from both API Management and Postman(by calling API endpoint) but no luck. Also tried removing all the other policies.

Can someone help me understand if we have to do any kind of whitelisting or additional roles to be added to call CPI from APIM?

Below is the screen from APIM Debug :

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Madhura

entry.title: Re: SAP Sales and Service Cloud side-by-side extensions - Development Patterns
entry.content:
@frehan88 @Kinsbrunner This is one of my biggest points of criticism toward SAP's decision to forgo offering an OData API for V2. 

If V2 would offer an OData API you could quite easily design your data access layer in a way that all it would take was swapping the metadata, regenerating the OData client, and mapping the fields you use in your application. Outside of edge cases this would allow you to migrate V1 apps to V2 without having to rewrite them. 

Alas, SAP decided to make implementer's life harder by not offering OData for V2. As it stands today, to make an app migratable you would have to implement your own intermediate data model, a mapping layer between the data access and your model, and two seperate client implementations. 

I have raised this issue multiple times to SAP, but so far unfortunately to no avail.

entry.title: Re: Odata Service $skip vs. $skiptoken
entry.content:
The main difference is that

  • $skip is well-defined: its value is the non-negative number of entities to skip when constructing the result
  • $skiptoken is reserved for service-specific use in server-driven paging

Some known uses of $skiptoken:

  • Contains the last key sent with this page
  • Contains the first key to be sent with the next page
  • Contains a stringified JSON object with enough information for the service to decide where to start the next page

My personal recommendation to service implementors

  • $skiptoken contains encrypted information, with a weekly rotated secret key

The OData specification requires that

OData clients MUST NOT use the system query option $skiptoken when constructing requests.

My advice to client developers:

  • Use $skip for paging, it is documented
  • Don't try to decrypt a specific service's use of $skiptoken
    • It may be different tomorrow
    • It most likely is different for the next service you encounter

Does this answer your question?

entry.title: RCM and RMK usage/compatibility question
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

For context, there are two companies using the instance/tenant.

In the current setup (RCM), they each have their own External Career Sites. One, the default, the other is a microsite for the other company/subsidiary.

Now, only one company is ready for RMK so we are setting it up for them. They have their own brand.

The problem we are having, and the one I want to consult you on is, the RMK design is bleeding over to both microsites, not just the default one.

I guess this is the correct behavior but I have a few questions:

1) Is there a way to isolate RMK to only the default External Career SIte?

2) Confirmation that this is not doable

entry.title: Re: PO Form Template Extend Custom Field to Limit Item Nodes
entry.content: i have a same requirment now, how can i extend custom fields to the LImit nodes, Is it solved.....? Please provide the approach if it was done

entry.title: Re: Route Schedule in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

According to product management team's comment:

"The LE-TRA Route is not a strategic object and has been released only to allow limited scheduling functionality. Therefore, SAP does not plan any innovations for this object, like route schedule. As well no integration into any new innovations is planned."

Referring from 3261640 - Usage of LE-TRA Route and discontinuation of Transportation features of LE-TRA in public cloud, for a more flexible and advanced Scheduling Process, the customer can use the Business Process Scheduling BPS in CE2208.

That means, "Route Schedule" has been deprecated in S/4HANA Cloud, public edition. You may need to adopt new solutions accordingly.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Using location functions and variables
entry.content:
Here's a function we used in our developer challenge (thanks @eshrinivasan) to tell if something is nearby. You can modify it to return the actual distance.

function arePointsNearBy(currentLocation, venueLocation, km) { 
   var ky = 40000 / 360; 
   var kx = Math.cos(Math.PI * venueLocation.lat / 180.0) * ky; 
   var dx = Math.abs(venueLocation.lng - currentLocation.lng) * kx; 
   var dy = Math.abs(venueLocation.lat - currentLocation.lat) * ky; 
   return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy) <= km; 
}

I'm sure Shrini can help if you need something even more sophisticated.

entry.title: error ,While developing my First SAPUI5 Web App on Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hi Guys

Please can you assist me I am getting a error  ,

While developing my First SAPUI5 Web App on Cloud Foundry ( 

https://developers.sap.com/mission.sapui5-cf-first.html 

 

 

Run the web app

Running your application has several advantages over deploying it. Among others, it’s faster, doesn’t require a “build” step and won’t minify your JavaScript codebase.

  1. To run the pre-generated run configuration, switch to the Run Configuration panel on the left-hand bar. Click the Create configuration button and then selection your project sapui5. Another window will open for further configuration. Select test/flpSandbox.html for the File Name for your configuration and then click Save.

 

  1. Click on the ▶ icon of the first run configuration to add start the SAPUI5 app.

 

Thanks & Regards ,

Durgarao.

entry.title: Re: Transport Custom Workflow from Development to QA Server

entry.title: Re: Custom apps displayed as blank page in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi  @AndreasMuno 

Thanks for your reply.

The reason for the blank page is URL was not correct.

the "expertMode=true" parameter is not placed correctly. It should right after the intent, e.g.
https://myXXXXXX.s4hana.ondemand.com/ui?sap-ushell-config=lean#WorkflowTask-displayInbox?expertMode=true&allItems=true

entry.title: Re: Let's get to know each other!
entry.content:
Hi all,

i'm Daniel Lerch a Business Process Manager of my company. With that i'm responsible to create a company wide process management system, roll out SAP Signavio to the company and support projects with the process point of view of their needed changes.

I joined this group because i want to learn about different ways we can go. additional to that i want to give insides of my work. Not everybody has the opportunity to create a complete process management from scratch. It can be challenging and easy at the same time. 

With that if have good knowledge of how to find out unofficial structures, introduce process thinking to other people and how to structure project work with the help of process thinking. 

I started my work with SAP Signavio Process Manager and later on with the Collaboration Hub. For both systems i'm the administrator. I built all the structure and setup of user groups value chains and process notations.

The proudest moment was when my Business Process Management Experts of all the different departments really started to model their own processes and pushed the management system by them self. It's like a father sees his child doing the first steps.

Big thank you for creating this group.

Greetings

Daniel

entry.title: How Winning Product Designs Leverage PLM and ERP
entry.content:
Close collaboration between engineering teams inside and outside the enterprise requires a comprehensive approach to product development.

The ability to identify, define and specify new product ideas is paramount for maintaining competitive advantage in the dynamic world of manufacturing. Engineers play a crucial role in this process, bridging the gap between concept and reality.

However, the creation of successful new products calls for a comprehensive approach that involves multiple departments and links to a wide range of enterprise processes. Selecting and defining new products requires close collaboration between teams and participants beyond the R&D or Engineering organization and even beyond the enterprise itself.

Identifying New Product Opportunities

The first step towards creating a successful product is typically the collection of ideas from the internal community, including product experts, technicians and the marketing and sales teams. In addition, external sources such as customers, partners and technology experts need to be involved to understand the needs of the market.

This idea collection process is collaborative, facilitated through a central idea repository that is ideally available as a cloud service accessible by internal and external communities worldwide.

A central idea management platform helps companies to keep track of promising new product candidates, share and develop product ideas with the community and discover synergies between ideas from various business units within the company.

Valuable input can also be gained through a continuous review of revenues, cost and quality performance of the company’s existing product portfolio. Declining sales numbers or increasing production costs can indicate the need for a product re-design or new product generation. For this reason, product managers need to be able to retrieve a 360-degree product view that includes multiple product aspects such as product revenues, quality and compliance information as well as development and production costs.

Such a 360-degree view requires connecting a Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) system to the company’s enterprise resource planning (ERP) system and its associated accounting, production and supply processes.

Managing so many product details can quickly overwhelm innovation and product management teams, but using Artificial Intelligence (AI) can help support these teams by scanning and identifying similar ideas, connecting experts across the company and identifying synergies between development projects.

This is why idea management is not just a spreadsheet of good product ideas: it’s a managed business process that requires collaboration, integration with ERP and input from across the company and beyond, blended with a bit help from AI.

 

Screenshot of Product Innovation Campaigns with an application within the SAP PLM solutions portfolio.

 

Selecting the Best Product Ideas with Portfolio Management

Once a promising product idea has been identified, it’s time to ask for budget and resources to develop and bring the product to the market. In a highly innovative company, there will be hundreds of new product ideas all competing for the same limited resources and budgets. How do you ensure the right projects are picked to avoid burning money and resources with R&D projects that deliver low value or which do not meet the overall corporate strategy?

Companies with large product portfolios—e.g. in consumer products, life sciences or high-tech—have established a portfolio management process for this purpose. This process helps the product managers at those enterprises analyze new product investments as well as compare costs, risks and benefits for each development project. In addition, product managers can also use scoring methods to generate a ranked list of project ideas and evaluate how these investments fit to corporate strategy and goals.

In a highly dynamic environment, a structured portfolio management process is important to reduce the risk of poor investment decisions, resulting in a highly effective R&D team that can steadily increase its output of successful and sustainable product launches.

As a pre-condition for running an efficient portfolio management process, it is crucial for a company to define and communicate clear, strategic objectives and develop a prioritization framework that considers factors such as strategic alignment, potential return on investment, resource availability, market demand and risk.

The portfolio process requires product managers to evaluate the feasibility of each project proposal by assessing its technical, operational, financial and market viability. In addition, costs and benefits associated with each project need to be estimated before the investment decision is made. These estimates will serve later as the baseline for monitoring planned product development costs against actual value provided by the accounting department.

Last but not least, portfolio management aims to check the organization’s resource capacity, including personnel, budget and infrastructure. It ensures that selected projects can be adequately supported without overburdening the organization. Here, project portfolio management requires accurate insights into workforce availability, considering individual information such as sickness, leave and working hours. Ideally, a resource planning tool should be able to retrieve this information from the HR system and match availability against the project demands.

 

Capacity Planning with SAP’s Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management and SAP Analytics Cloud.

 

An efficient portfolio decision process requires multi-dimensional input from various teams and processes across the company and beyond. Portfolio management is a true ERP discipline that is fueled with project and product ideas and information from sales, finance, manufacturing and HR.

Executing and Monitoring Product Development Projects

Translating portfolio decisions into executable tactical project plans represents a critical breaking point in the innovation process. How do you ensure that agreed upon timelines, budgets and resource commitments are available to successfully initiate and execute the project on the operational level? It’s been observed that, in many organizations, portfolio management is managed through an isolated  IT solution, decoupled from the tactical project management system and ERP processes.

This increases the risk that projects will start to deviate from their initial plan and goals, failing to deliver the outcomes that have been agreed on and approved by the portfolio stakeholder. Thus, it is crucial that every investment case that is approved within a portfolio management solution is firmly linked to an operational project plan. This enables the stakeholders to track project execution and understand how changes impact the initial business case.

By establishing a systematic link between strategic planning and operational execution, the project management office can reduce the need for manual interactions and automate a large part of the reporting process. This enables the project management office to handle large project portfolios and quickly generate comprehensive and accurate project reports at any time.

A real, live example from a German automotive supplier shows that automating the synchronization between the strategic portfolio and the tactical project level shortened the time for generating stakeholder reports from several weeks to a few hours.

 

Manage projects company-wide from a centralized repository and keep the portfolio on track – from forecasting and planning to accounting and closure with SAP.

 

The growing complexity of products, driven not only by new technologies but also by an increasing amount of sustainability, product compliance and commercial requirements leads to more complex development projects.

In the past, a local team would be sufficient to develop and launch a single product. Nowadays, a full armada of experts spread across the globe must be involved. This requires additional efforts in terms of coordination and synchronization between project team members. In such virtual work environments, team members need to be proactively informed about expected deliverables, tasks and timelines. In addition, team members in remote locations need ways to easily report back progress, changes and upcoming issues in the project.

A global cloud-based project platform can help to facilitate the collaboration between project members beyond silos in engineering and stakeholders in and outside of an enterprise by providing direct access to project plans, task lists and status reports from anywhere in the world. In addition, the ability to link project tasks directly to the engineering work—such as CAD drawings, specifications, requirements lists, etc.—helps the project manager keep track of deliverables in each development stage and monitor overall project progress based on real engineering artifacts.

 

Manage and track project costs with Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management in SAP S/4HANA.

 

Design Better with PLM and ERP Together

Creating successful new products in the manufacturing industry requires a holistic approach that integrates not only research and engineering but also a wide range of ERP process, including finance/controlling, compliance, sustainability, supply chain and human resource management.

By fostering cross-departmental collaboration through a PLM solution that is deeply integrated into a company’s ERP system and using early supplier networks, enterprises are able to increase their efficiency in designing winning products for highly competitive markets.

By leveraging a natively integrated PLM+ERP environment, engineers and designers can efficiently define their portfolio to develop and deliver sustainable and profitable products that meet customer needs.

Read more in the article Striking the Perfect Balance and on the SAP website.

entry.title: Re: elearning pop up window?
entry.content:
If that is not working in the expected way and it was working that way before, this is most probably a changed default-setting on your end, e.g. in the MS Edge defaults regarding the popup-blocker allow-listing. This would have to be checked with your Windows Policy owners, like the client administration team. 

The other reason may be changed playback settings for books on SEN's end. There might be a book page called without address bar and in a certain size etc., so, with certain appearance properties that can't be applied to an existing browser window. If that is forced by the link properties, there will be a new window per definition, since the current window has an address bar and a size etc. and JavaScript can't force an existing window to change it's appearance. 

That’s the two reasons I can think of.

All the best, Mike

entry.title: The runtime resources from previous The runtime resources from previous subscription have not been c
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: Every single time I try to use Java it wont work
entry.content:
Check this link for formulas: https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/formula-functions

For Java example create a button and  go into the logic section for the button. Drag over the Javascript node at the bottom and hook up the component tap to the node. Double click the node and replace the sample code in there with console.log('Hello world');

Run it using the preview on the web, open the console log in the browser and tap the button.
